## PM Tool

Which project management tool should AgentFlow support?

## Why

Why is this adapter important? How many users would benefit?

## Key Features

Which features of this PM tool map well to AgentFlow's requirements?
- [ ] Kanban board view
- [ ] Task comments
- [ ] Task dependencies
- [ ] Sections/columns
- [ ] API access
- [ ] MCP server available

## Willing to Contribute?

Are you interested in building this adapter? (Y/N)
